tasks.instruction: Read the text below. Fill in each gap (1.1-1.6) with one word to make the text correct.
tasks.text:
Dolphins are some of the smartest animals in the ocean. They live in groups 1.1. _________ are called pods, and they help each other find food and stay safe. Unlike most fish, dolphins 1.2. _________ not lay eggs — they give birth to live babies and feed 1.3. _________ with milk, just like cats or dogs do.

Dolphins communicate with each other 1.4. _________ making clicking and whistling sounds. Scientists believe that each dolphin has its 1.5. _________ special whistle, almost like a name. Some researchers have even managed to teach dolphins to understand simple commands, 1.6. _________ nobody has worked out how to have a real conversation with them yet.
